title: Scheduler Control Plane
subtitle: Manage background jobs, inspect run history, and trigger reruns.
registeredJobsDesc: Built-in background jobs with their cadence, health, and next due time.
jobDetailsDesc: Inspect, configure, and manage the selected job.

jobDetail.disableJobDesc: This will stop automatic execution of "{name}". You can still trigger it manually.
jobDetail.enableJobDesc: This will resume automatic execution of "{name}" on schedule: {schedule}.
jobDetail.selectJob: Select a scheduler job to inspect details and history.

runHistory.noRuns: No run history recorded for this job yet.
